name: sprintask
description: Plataforma SaaS para gestión de proyectos freelance

scripts.dev: npm run dev -w apps/api & npm run dev -w apps/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build:post -w apps/web
scripts.build:deploy: node scripts/prebuild.js && npm run build:deploy -w apps/api && npm run build:post -w apps/web && node scripts/prepare-deploy.js
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/web
